caption: A man with glasses, a white shirt, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured headpiece sits in a studio setting. He wears large black headphones and faces a black microphone on a stand. The background features walls decorated with several framed photographs and a clothing rack with a "LEE" brand shirt. A logo in the lower-left corner of each shot reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon. Another logo on the right side repeats "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains nearly stationary, maintaining a neutral expression while looking slightly off-camera. There are no significant movements or interactions; the scene is a static shot of the man in the studio, with only subtle changes in his posture and facial expression as the video progresses.
